title: Update JS rendering methods + convert settings to full-panel page
description: Update all JavaScript rendering methods in panel/index.js that generate dynamic HTML to match the new compact design system. Key changes: (1) update search result rendering in res-input-query handler to produce flat list items instead of grid cards, (2) update component bar rendering in res-list-current-components handler for compact chips, (3) convert openSettingsModal/closeSettingsModal to page toggle pattern (show/hide #main vs #settings-modal), (4) update renderSettingsContent() for compact page layout, (5) update setSearchUiState() for compact states. All IPC message contracts and DataManager API calls must remain unchanged.

criteria: Search result items rendered as flat list rows (not grid cards): single div with component-name span + type badge, 22-24px height
Component bar chips rendered at 20px height with 11px font, delete X appears on hover only
renderSettingsContent() produces compact layout: 20px controls, 1px separators, 11px section headers
setSearchUiState() handles empty/loading/results states with compact styling
svgIcon() calls updated: toolbar buttons use size 'sm' (14px), list items use size 'xs' (12px, new size to add)
All 13 IPC message handlers still function correctly
No hardcoded 44px, #6366f1, or oversized padding values in JS-generated HTML
convergence.verification: Test complete user flow: search for component, view results, add component, delete component, open/close settings, toggle all settings, use keyboard shortcuts.
convergence.definition_of_done: All dynamic HTML generation matches the compact design system. Settings page works as full-panel replacement. All existing functionality preserved.

changes: Change search result innerHTML to flat list item: compact component-name + inline type badge
Remove entry animation (translateY + opacity) for instant rendering
Add CSS class 'search-result' with type modifier for styling
Result click: add accent color flash (#22C55E) instead of previous indigo
Update createHighlightedText() output to use 12px font styling
Update createBadges() to produce compact inline badges (10px, muted color)
Update ui-button creation: remove hardcoded background '#b54344', use CSS class instead
Set compact chip styling: 20px height, 4px padding, 11px font
Delete X: use svgIcon with xs size (12px), hidden by default, shown on parent hover
Remove inline style overrides (let CSS handle all styling)
Convert from modal pattern (add/remove 'show' class on overlay) to page pattern (toggle display of #main and #settings-modal)
openSettingsModal: hide #main, show #settings-modal, render content, focus first control
closeSettingsModal: hide #settings-modal, show #main, restore focus to settings button
Update ARIA: #settings-modal gets role='region' aria-label='settings', not dialog/modal roles
Remove focus trap (handleSettingsModalKeydown Tab cycling) since it is a page view, not modal
Keep Escape key handler to close settings page
Rewrite generated HTML for compact page layout
Section headers: 11px uppercase muted text with 1px bottom border
Input controls: 20px height, compact padding
Toggle/checkbox controls: 20px height, aligned right
Remove card-style sections, use flat compact layout
Preserve all dataManager getter/setter calls unchanged
Add 'xs' size option: 12px for list item icons
Keep existing sizes: sm=14px (was 16px, update), md=18px (was 20px), lg=24px
Add 'arrowLeft' icon path to ICON_PATHS for settings back button
Update state transitions for compact layout
Empty state: show single-line muted text (no icon)
Loading state: show 2 compact skeleton items
Results state: show flat list container

implementation.description: Update svgIcon system for compact sizes
actions: Add 'xs' size: 12px to svgIcon() size map
Update 'sm' to 14px (from 16px), 'md' to 18px (from 20px)
Add ICON_PATHS.arrowLeft SVG path for settings back button
Verify all existing icon references still work
In res-input-query handler, update ui-button innerHTML generation
Use flat layout: {highlighted}{type}
Remove translateY/opacity animation styles
Update createBadges() for compact inline badges
Ensure onclick (addCom), oncontextmenu (toggleFavorite), keydown (Enter/Space) preserved
In res-list-current-components handler, remove inline style='background:#b54344'
Add CSS class for component chip styling (let TASK-001 CSS handle colors)
Compact innerHTML: count badge + name, 11px font
Keep keyboard reorder (A/D keys) and hover detection unchanged

implementation.description: Convert settings modal to page pattern
actions: Rewrite openSettingsModal(): this.$main.style.display='none'; this.$settingsModal.style.display='flex'
Rewrite closeSettingsModal(): this.$settingsModal.style.display='none'; this.$main.style.display='flex'
Remove focus trap logic (handleSettingsModalKeydown Tab cycling)
Keep Escape handler for closing settings
Update ARIA attributes for page (not dialog) semantics
Generate compact HTML: flat sections with 1px separators
20px controls, 11px headers, minimal padding
Preserve all dataManager API calls and event binding in bindSettingsEvents()
Preserve all t() i18n calls for labels
Empty: show #list-empty with single-line text
Loading: show #list-loading with 2 skeleton items
Results: show #list-items with flat list
Update result count display in inline #result-count span

reference.pattern: Existing IPC message handler pattern in panel/index.js messages section
reference.examples: Keep same pattern: receive IPC data, process, update DOM. Only change the HTML output structure and styling.

rationale.chosen_approach: Update rendering output within existing handler structure. Keep all IPC contracts, DataManager calls, and event binding patterns. Only change the HTML strings and CSS classes generated by rendering methods.
alternatives_considered: Extract rendering to separate module (too risky for single-file pattern, breaks this context)
Use template literals instead of innerHTML (would be cleaner but massive change to rendering pattern)
rationale.tradeoffs: Settings page conversion is the most complex change; need careful handling of show/hide state management

risks.description: Settings page show/hide may conflict with existing modal state management
risks.mitigation: Remove all modal-specific code (overlay, focus trap, aria-modal) and replace with simple display toggle
risks.fallback: Keep modal pattern but constrain to max-width:100%

risks.description: Removing entry animation may cause visual jarring when results appear
risks.mitigation: Use subtle opacity:0->1 transition at 150ms instead of translateY

manual_checks: Search for 'cc.Sprite', verify results appear as flat compact list
Click add button, verify component added successfully
Right-click result, verify context menu works
Open settings page, verify all 6 sections render correctly
Close settings page, verify main view restored
Verify component bar chips render compactly with hover delete
success_metrics: Zero hardcoded 44px values in JS-generated HTML
Zero hardcoded #6366f1 values in JS-generated HTML

commit.message_template: refactor(panel-js): update rendering methods and convert settings to page pattern
